source_quote: Alcohol Use Disorder, moderate (F10.20); Major Depressive Disorder, single episode, moderate (F32.1); Insomnia disorder (G47.00); Hypertension (I10), GERD (K21.0), Lumbar disc herniation (M51.16)

name: clinical.presenting_symptoms
value: Patient reports drinking too much since divorce, inability to sleep, feeling angry all the time, and snapping at a client last week. Checked symptoms include: depressed mood, irritability/anger, sleep disturbance (insomnia), increased alcohol use, loss of interest in activities, fatigue, appetite changes (decreased), and difficulty concentrating. Current alcohol use: Beer and occasionally whiskey, daily consumption of 6-8 beers/day (more on weekends), last drink last night, experiencing mild tremors in the morning (withdrawal symptoms).
source_quote: I've been drinking too much since my divorce and I can't sleep. My daughter made me come. I feel angry all the time and I snapped at a client last week. I think I need help.

name: clinical.history
value: Symptoms duration: approximately 8 months (since divorce finalized June 2025). No previous treatment for alcohol use. Medical conditions include Hypertension (I10), GERD (K21.0), and Lumbar disc herniation (M51.16). Surgical history: Appendectomy (2001). Family psychiatric history: Father had Alcohol use disorder (deceased, age 62); Mother has Depression (treated). No history of suicidal ideation, suicide attempts, homicidal ideation, violence, or self-harm. Preliminary diagnoses: 1) Alcohol Use Disorder, moderate (F10.20), 2) Major Depressive Disorder, single episode, moderate (F32.1), 3) Insomnia disorder (G47.00).
source_quote: Duration: ~8 months (since divorce finalized June 2025); Previous treatment: None; Family psych history: Father: Alcohol use disorder (deceased, age 62); Mother: Depression (treated)

name: clinical.medications
source_quote: Current medications: Lisinopril 20mg daily, Omeprazole 20mg daily. No psychiatric medications.

name: clinical.treatment_goals
value: Recommended services include: Psychiatric evaluation, Individual therapy (CBT + motivational interviewing), Consider intensive outpatient program (IOP) for alcohol use, Frequency: 2x/week initially.
source_quote: Recommended services: • Psychiatric evaluation • Individual therapy (CBT + motivational interviewing) • Consider intensive outpatient program (IOP) for alcohol use • Frequency: 2x/week initially
